flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Williston State College rose 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.4k → $10.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Williston State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Williston State College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (52.5% → 66.3%).
